name: react-diff-viewer-continued
when_to_use: 需要在 React 中把两个字符串直接渲成 GitHub 风格 split/unified、词级高亮与折叠视图时用它而非手写表格,因为原生在行对齐、词内差异和折叠上下文上失败;非做可编辑 merge、AST 语义 diff 或 patch 应用。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能做短文本静态并排,做不到稳定的行号对齐、词内差异、上下文折叠和大 diff 虚拟化组合。

schema.oldValue: string | object —— 基准值;object 仅配 compareMethod JSON
schema.newValue: string | object —— 对照值;object 仅配 compareMethod JSON
schema.splitView?: boolean —— true 双栏,false unified,默认 true
schema.showDiffOnly?: boolean —— 是否折叠未变化行,默认 true
schema.useWorker?: boolean —— 默认 false;本 entry 为载体稳定性默认同步计算,确认 Blob Worker 可用后才设 true

spec.note: 组件主体是 diff 表格;外层显式 max-height 400px 并 overflow:auto,AI 可改像素值但禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):React createRoot + DiffViewer;默认 disableWorker:true 避开 Blob Worker 能力差异。

peer.note: 本包是 React 组件;如只要 change 数组而不要 UI,改用 headless 的 diff entry。

carriers.widget: conditional:Emotion 会默认注入 document.head,须按 boot 用 MutationObserver 把 react-diff style 搬进 shadow;默认关闭 worker
carriers.codex: supported:React ESM + 同步 diff;启用 useWorker 前须另验 Blob Worker

isolation.evidence: deps @emotion/css + @emotion/react inject <style data-emotion> into document.head; +esm defines two caches key:"react-diff" and key:"highlighted-diff". Diff table renders inside the React mount container; no global document/window listeners (optional diff worker is Blob-based and disabled by default via disableWorker). Shadow works only if BOTH emotion caches are relocated into the shadow root.
